_comment_manifest_version: Manifest V3 is required for modern Chrome/Edge extensions.
name: Power Automate Force v3=false
_comment_name: Extension name shown in the browser extension UI.
description: Forces v3=false on Power Automate flow and run URLs.
_comment_description: Short summary visible in extension details.
_comment_homepage_url: Shown in extension details as the extension homepage link (Chrome/Edge). Publisher name is set in the store dashboard, not here.
_comment_icons: PNG raster icons per Chrome manifest; 128 used for install and Chrome Web Store.

content_scripts._comment_matches: Inject only on Power Automate web app pages.
content_scripts._comment_js: Single vanilla JS content script with URL enforcement logic.
content_scripts._comment_run_at: Run early so URL is corrected during initial app load.
